texto: The muffled drum's sad roll has beat The soldier's last tattoo No more on Life's parade shall meet The brave and fallen few. On Fame's eternal camping-ground Their silent tents are spread And Glory guards with solemn round The bivouac of the dead.
explicacao: Citação de Theodore O'Hara sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “The muffled drum's sad roll has beat The soldier's last tattoo No more on Life's parade shall mee…” articula reflexao, soldier, muffled em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
